plugins.name: color-hypr-picker
plugins.author: off94
plugins.description: A color picker plugin that extends Noctalia's base one with hyprpicker. Paste several color codes to your clipboard, and browse recent colors list.

plugins.name: Hyprshot menu
plugins.author: off94
plugins.description: A GUI to do several kinds of screenshots with hyprshot.

plugins.name: Radio player
plugins.author: off94
plugins.description: A radio player widget that lets you listen to any radio station online from a custom list.
